The '''Atrig system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It centered around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Atrig]] and contained the [[Grillis]] [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] and eight [[Planet/Legends|planets]].

{{System-stub}}
